title: Easy Rich Syrian Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and comforting Syrian lamb stew featuring celery salt and beurre-monte, perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they are softened and lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the celery salt, beurre-monte, allspice, cinnamon, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
Let the stew rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve with pita bread or over rice.
